case.label: Quiz practice phone photo produces nonblank accommodation guidance

notObviouslyRelevant.name: Test in a small group when requested.
notObviouslyRelevant.reason: The task context does not suggest a need for small group testing.

notObviouslyRelevant.name: Use of multiplication chart.
notObviouslyRelevant.reason: The task context does not suggest a need for a multiplication chart.

relevantAccommodations.applicationReason: The task is timed at 30 minutes, and extended time may help the student manage the time constraint while working on the quiz.
implementationNotes: Ask how to use the extended time on tests for this timed quiz.
relevantAccommodations.name: Extended time on tests (2 days)
relevantAccommodations.whyItMayMatter: Extended time may help the student manage the time constraint of the 30-minute quiz.

relevantAccommodations.applicationReason: The task involves finding areas, which may involve calculations. The accommodation allows the use of a calculator unless the test specifically focuses on calculation fluency.
implementationNotes: Check if the quiz requires calculation tests, and use the calculator for finding the areas.
relevantAccommodations.name: Use of calculator except for calculation tests
relevantAccommodations.plainLanguage: Use of calculator except for calculation tests.
relevantAccommodations.sourceText: Use of calculator except for calculation tests.
relevantAccommodations.whyItMayMatter: The use of a calculator may be relevant for finding the areas required by the quiz.

coachNotes: Please confirm with the student how the extended time on tests will be applied to this specific timed quiz.
Check with the student if the quiz requires calculation tests, as the use of a calculator is permitted unless the test focuses on calculation fluency.
The use of the multiplication chart is also available if needed for the work.
parentGuidance.summary: For the upcoming 30-minute timed quiz on Areas of Circles and Composite Figures, the following accommodations are available: Extended time on tests (2 days), Use of calculator except for calculation tests, and Use of multiplication chart.

alternativeScripts: Can I have extended time for this quiz?
I need a little extra time to finish the quiz.
May I have extended time on this test?
studentGuidance.startHere: When you take the Areas of Circles quiz, you can ask for some accommodations. You can ask for extended time on tests. You can also use a calculator for the quiz, except for tests that focus only on calculation.
studentGuidance.suggestedScript: I would like to use the extended time on tests for this quiz. Can I have that time?

staffNotes: The quiz is timed for 30 minutes. Confirm how the extended time accommodation should be applied to this timed practice.
The accommodation for calculator use applies unless the quiz specifically focuses on calculation tests. Check if the quiz requires calculation tests.
The accommodation for testing in a small group when requested and the use of a multiplication chart do not appear relevant to this practice task.
teacherGuidance.summary: The student has accommodations for tests, including extended time and calculator use, for this timed practice quiz on areas of circles and composite figures.
